description:
Native English. Male, late 30s. High studio quality.
Persona: smooth political fixer. Emotion: warm, reassuring, attentive.
Pleasant mid-baritone, fluid and unhurried with a polished American delivery, built for the long dinner and the quiet aside; he softens statements and reframes rather than refuses, buying time with grace.
text: Let's be realistic. Nobody's asking you to surrender anything... [warm] I just want to keep a few doors open. There's always another way through this, if the right people are still in the room. [laughs] And they always are.
